snippets.title: Declaring variables
snippets.explanation: const prevents reassignment of the binding; let allows it.

snippets.title: Checking types with typeof
snippets.code:
typeof 'hi';        // 'string'
typeof 42;          // 'number'
typeof true;        // 'boolean'
typeof undefined;   // 'undefined'
typeof null;        // 'object'  (a historical quirk!)
typeof {};          // 'object'
typeof [];          // 'object'
typeof function(){};// 'function'
snippets.explanation: typeof null returning 'object' is a famous bug kept for backward compatibility.

snippets.title: Value vs reference
snippets.explanation: Primitives copy values, objects copy references to the same underlying value.
